versions.version_description: This version has an added Dm chord, adding a bit more detail. This isn't perfect, as other chords are present in the song, but it is a simplified version for playing on a guitar. No capo.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
You can play around with the different strumming patterns for it, it's a pretty versatile song
Capo on the 1st Fret

During the pre-chorus, instead of the chords you may choose to fingerpick this instead

[tab]e|--------2--0-----2--0----2--0------------------|
B|--------------3-------3-------3-----0----------|
G|--4--2---------------------------------------2-|
D|-----------------------------------------------|
A|--2--------------------------------------------|
E|-----------------------------------------------|[/tab]

Just repeat it until the pre-chorus is over.
You may also choose to do this during the outro as well
And for the last 2 lines of the intro

[Intro]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
Mm-mm, mm-mm-mm-mm, mm-mm-mm, uh[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
I can't breathe (Chopsquad), I can't breathe, 999[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Waiting for the exhale[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
I toss my pain with my wishes in a wishing well[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
I can't breathe, I'm waiting for the exhale[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Toss my pain with my wishes in a wishing well[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
Still no luck, but oh well[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
I still try even though I know I'm gon' fail[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Stress on my shoulders like a anvil[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Perky got me itching like a anthill[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Drugs killing me softly, Lauryn Hill[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Sometimes I don't know how to feel[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
Ring-ring, phone call from depression[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
You used my past and my memories as a weapon[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
On the other line, I talk to addiction, huh[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
Speaking of the devil, all the drugs, I miss them[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
This can't be real, is it fiction?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Somethin' feels broke, need to fix it[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
I cry out for help, do they listen?[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
I'ma be alone until it's finished[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
This is the part where I tell you I'm fine, but I'm lying[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
I just don't want you to worry[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
This is the part where I take all my feelings and hide 'em[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]
'Cause I don't want nobody to hurt me[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
I can't breathe, I'm waiting for the exhale[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Toss my pain with my wishes in a wishing well[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Still no luck, but oh well[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
I still try even though I know I'm gon' fail[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
It's stress on my shoulders like a anvil[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Perky got me itching like a anthill[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Drugs killing me softly, Lauryn Hill[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Sometimes I don't know how to feel[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Sometimes I don't know how to feel[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Let's be for real[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
If it wasn't for the pills, I wouldn't be here[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
But if I keep taking these pills, I won't be here, yeah[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
I just told y'all my secret, yeah[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
It's tearing me to pieces[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
I really think I need them[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]C[/ch]
I stopped taking the drugs and now the drugs take me[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
This is the part where I tell you I'm fine, but I'm lying[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
I just don't want you to worry[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]

[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
